# zstack_price_table (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage price tables in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the price table.
- `prices` (Attributes List) Price entries to create with the price table. ZStack does not return these entries from QueryPriceTable, so changes force replacement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prices))

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the price table.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the price table.

<a id="nestedatt--prices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prices`

Required:

- `price` (Number) The price for this resource and time unit.
- `resource_name` (String) The billable resource name, for example cpu, memory, rootVolume, dataVolume, or publicIp.
- `resource_unit` (String) The billable resource unit.
- `time_unit` (String) The billing time unit, for example `s`.

Optional:

- `date_in_long` (Number) Optional effective timestamp in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.
- `system_tags` (List of String) Optional system tags for this price entry.
